completed_tasks.name: Wave 1 — FastAPI scaffold + jira_config model + SQL migration
Wave 2 — JiraService (Fernet + Jira auth) + REST endpoints

remaining_tasks.name: Run 5 browser UAT tests against live backend + frontend
Mark Phase 1 complete in ROADMAP.md + STATE.md after UAT passes
Optional: fix 5 critical code review issues before Phase 2 (recommended)

human_actions_pending.action: Set up .env in backend/ (copy .env.example, fill DB_PASSWORD, generate FERNET_KEY)
human_actions_pending.context: Backend will crash on startup without FERNET_KEY. Use: python3 -c "from cryptography.fernet import Fernet; print(Fernet.generate_key().decode())"

human_actions_pending.action: Run MySQL migration: mysql -u root -p < migrations/001_create_jira_config.sql
human_actions_pending.context: Creates jira_db database + jira_config table. Backend will fail to connect without this.

human_actions_pending.action: Start backend: cd backend && uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000
Start frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run dev
Execute 5 UAT tests from 01-HUMAN-UAT.md in browser
human_actions_pending.context: Tests: success flow, invalid credentials, unreachable host, auto-verify no-config, responsive 900px breakpoint

human_actions_pending.action: Report UAT results: say 'approved' if all pass, or describe failures for gap closure
human_actions_pending.context: On approval: agent marks Phase 1 complete and advances to Phase 2

decisions.decision: Fernet encryption for API token at rest

decisions.rationale: no project key in Phase 1 — D-01

decisions.decision: CSS Modules, no shadcn, no Tailwind

decisions.rationale: Vite proxy exists but form bypasses it via absolute URLs — advisory finding IN-03
Code review CR-01 flags this as SSRF risk — not yet fixed

next_action: User is running UAT. If results are 'approved': update ROADMAP.md Phase 1 checkbox to [x], update STATE.md to Phase 2, update REQUIREMENTS.md traceability for JIRA-01/02/03, then present /gsd-discuss-phase 2 options. If issues reported: run /gsd-plan-phase 1 --gaps for gap closure plans.
context_notes: Phase 1 fully implemented across 3 waves (9 commits). Code review found 5 critical issues: CR-01 SSRF (http:// allowed), CR-02 DB connection leak (no try/finally), CR-03 FERNET_KEY crash on missing key, CR-04 missing UNIQUE constraint (rows accumulate), CR-05 unbounded api_token length. These are not blocking UAT but should be fixed before Phase 2 ships. Frontend ConnectionForm hardcodes http://localhost:8000 — works for local dev but not production-ready. Backend proxy in vite.config.js is dead code for connect flow.
